title: agentreflex reflex manifest (v1)
description: Manifest for an official agentreflex reflex (reflex.json).

$schema.description: Reference to this schema for editor validation.

name.description: Unique reflex id. Lowercase kebab-case; must match the folder name.

title.description: Short human-readable name shown in the catalog.

description.description: One sentence: what this reflex catches or does.

version.description: Semver. Official reflexes track the monorepo via release-please.

license.description: SPDX license id. Official reflexes are MIT.

author.description: Author or org. 'agentreflex' for official reflexes.

official.description: True for reflexes that ship in the commons (/reflexes).

events.description: Lifecycle events this reflex handles. Must match the handlers it exports.

decisions.description: Verdicts this reflex can return. Declare only what it actually emits.

writes.description: Side effects (e.g. files the reflex snapshots). For onToolResult reflexes.

entry.description: Path to the built entry module, relative to the reflex folder (e.g. dist/index.js).

tags.description: Catalog facets (e.g. security, git, protective, proactive).

options.description: Config this reflex accepts via `.reflex/config.json` `with`, surfaced as `ctx.options`. Each key documents one option.
